TEXT.citation: Early, R. J., & Whitehorn, J. (2003). One hundred Paiwan texts. Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University.
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @book{100paiwantexts, author = {Robert Early and John Whitehorn}, title = {One Hundred Paiwan Texts}, year = {2003}, publisher = {Pacific Linguistics, Research School of Pacific and Asian Studies, The Australian National University}}

S.FORM: qai a siningelitan, sinsi.
S.PHON: qai a siniŋəɭitan, sinsi.
S.FORM: qai a siningelitan, sinsi.
S.PHON: qai a siniŋəɭitan, sinsi.
S.TRANSL: How we miss you, teacher.

S.FORM: aitsu tsuatsuay anga sun aravats a su vinaikan imaza i Tayuang.
S.PHON: aiʦu ʦuaʦuaj aŋa sun aravaʦ a su vinaikan imaza i tajuaŋ.
S.FORM: aicu cuacuay anga sun aravac a su vinaikan imaza i Tayuang.
S.PHON: aiʦu ʦuaʦuaj aŋa sun aravaʦ a su vinaikan imaza i tajuaŋ.
S.TRANSL: It is now a very long time since you left Taiwan.

S.FORM: tiamen singelitan amen aravats, talimuzamuzaw amen sakamaya tjanusun.
S.PHON: tiamən siŋəɭitan amən aravaʦ, taɭimuzamuzaw amən sakamaja canusun.
S.FORM: tiamen singelitan amen aravac, talimuzamuzaw amen sakamaya tjanusun.
S.PHON: tiamən siŋəɭitan amən aravaʦ, taɭimuzamuzaw amən sakamaja ʦanusun.
S.TRANSL: We miss you very much and just feel sad about you.

S.FORM: aki kemudakuda ti sinsi, aki kisamuɫamuɫa, aki napupitsul, ayaya men sakamaya.
S.PHON: aki kəmudakuda ti sinsi, aki kisamuʎamuʎa, aki napupiʦuɭ, ajaja mən sakamaja.
S.FORM: aki kemudakuda ti sinsi, aki kisamuljamulja, aki napupicul, ayaya men sakamaya.
S.PHON: aki kəmudakuda ti sinsi, aki kisamuʎamuʎa, aki napupiʦuɭ, ajaja mən sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: What is the teacher doing, is he working hard, is he well?, we keep saying.

S.FORM: ɫakua nu nia kinemnemen kudain a pinazazekazekatj timadju nua Tsemas tu mana uri kiqutjela tjanuitjen a imaza i Tayuang a katsalisian numa.
S.PHON: ʎakua nu nia kinəmnəmən kudain a pinazazəkazəkac timaɉu nua ʦəmas tu mana uri kiqucəɭa canuicən a imaza i tajuaŋ a kaʦaɭisian numa.
S.FORM: ljakua nu nia kinemnemen kudain a pinazazekazekatj timadju nua Cemas tu mana uri kiqutjela tjanuitjen a imaza i Tayuang a kacalisian numa.
S.PHON: ʎakua nu nia kinəmnəmən kudain a pinazazəkazəkaʦ timaɉu nua ʦəmas tu mana uri kiquʦəɭa ʦanuiʦən a imaza i tajuaŋ a kaʦaɭisian numa.
S.TRANSL: But when we think about it, he was ordered by God wasn’t he to be active for us mountain people here in Taiwan.

S.FORM: pai tutsu i tsadja timadju tjanuitjen, ɫakua ventsivetsik anan uta, kitulutulu anan uta tua kai nua Tsemas tua siɫaluayan a pasemalaw tjanuitjen a kematsalisianan uta tua kai nua Tsemas, nu aya men uta masasa men uta.
S.PHON: pai tuʦu i ʦaɉa timaɉu canuicən, ʎakua vənʦivəʦik anan uta, kituɭutuɭu anan uta tua kai nua ʦəmas tua siʎaɭuajan a pasəmaɭaw canuicən a kəmaʦaɭisianan uta tua kai nua ʦəmas, nu aja mən uta masasa mən uta.
S.FORM: pai tucu i cadja timadju tjanuitjen, ljakua vencivecik anan uta, kitulutulu anan uta tua kai nua Cemas tua siljaluayan a pasemalaw tjanuitjen a kemacalisianan uta tua kai nua Cemas, nu aya men uta masasa men uta.
S.PHON: pai tuʦu i ʦaɉa timaɉu ʦanuiʦən, ʎakua vənʦivəʦik anan uta, kituɭutuɭu anan uta tua kai nua ʦəmas tua siʎaɭuajan a pasəmaɭaw ʦanuiʦən a kəmaʦaɭisianan uta tua kai nua ʦəmas, nu aja mən uta masasa mən uta.
S.TRANSL: Now he is far away from us, but he is still studying, he is still learning about the word of God so as to be able to tell us clearly in the mountain language the word of God; when we think of this we are comforted.

S.FORM: pai aitsu titjen a tsautsau a mapuɫat tjara pinazazekazekatj itjen nua Tsemas tua uri tja sengsengan tusa tja kinaikatsauanan, tua mana uri tja djalan, tu uri pasainu itjen.
S.PHON: pai aiʦu ticən a ʦauʦau a mapuʎat cara pinazazəkazəkac icən nua ʦəmas tua uri ca səŋsəŋan tusa ca kinaikaʦauanan, tua mana uri ca ɉaɭan, tu uri pasainu icən.
S.FORM: pai aicu titjen a caucau a mapuljat tjara pinazazekazekatj itjen nua Cemas tua uri tja sengsengan tusa tja kinaikacauanan, tua mana uri tja djalan, tu uri pasainu itjen.
S.PHON: pai aiʦu tiʦən a ʦauʦau a mapuʎat ʦara pinazazəkazəkaʦ iʦən nua ʦəmas tua uri ʦa səŋsəŋan tusa ʦa kinaikaʦauanan, tua mana uri ʦa ɉaɭan, tu uri pasainu iʦən.
S.TRANSL: Well all we human beings get our orders from God about our work in our life, the way we should go, where we should go to.

S.FORM: qau pai tisun a ti sinsi kudain a pinazazekazekatj anga sun nua Tsemas tua sema maza i Tayuang a hunyaku tua nia kai a Payuang zuku.
S.PHON: qau pai tisun a ti sinsi kudain a pinazazəkazəkac aŋa sun nua ʦəmas tua səma maza i tajuaŋ a hunjaku tua nia kai a pajuaŋ zuku.
S.FORM: qau pai tisun a ti sinsi kudain a pinazazekazekatj anga sun nua Cemas tua sema maza i Tayuang a hunyaku tua nia kai a Payuang zuku.
S.PHON: qau pai tisun a ti sinsi kudain a pinazazəkazəkaʦ aŋa sun nua ʦəmas tua səma maza i tajuaŋ a hunjaku tua nia kai a pajuaŋ zuku.
S.TRANSL: And you, teacher, you have been ordered by God haven’t you to come to Taiwan to translate into our language of the Paiwan tribe.

S.FORM: tjara kipaqeneqenetji amen sakamaya.
S.PHON: cara kipaqənəqənəci amən sakamaja.
S.FORM: tjara kipaqeneqenetji amen sakamaya.
S.PHON: ʦara kipaqənəqənəʦi amən sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: Just remember us.

S.FORM: pai nu i gaku sun tjara liaw aravats a su siselapay a su sikaluɫay nua su qulu nua su kininemneman na su kinatsautsauan tua su kisamuɫa.
S.PHON: pai nu i gaku sun cara ɭiaw aravaʦ a su sisəɭapaj a su sikaɭuʎaj nua su quɭu nua su kininəmnəman na su kinaʦauʦauan tua su kisamuʎa.
S.FORM: pai nu i gaku sun tjara liaw aravac a su siselapay a su sikaluljay nua su qulu nua su kininemneman na su kinacaucauan tua su kisamulja.
S.PHON: pai nu i gaku sun ʦara ɭiaw aravaʦ a su sisəɭapaj a su sikaɭuʎaj nua su quɭu nua su kininəmnəman na su kinaʦauʦauan tua su kisamuʎa.
S.TRANSL: When you are in the school you will have a lot to put up with, you will be tired in your head, your thinking and your body because of working hard;

S.FORM: ɫakua nuka ki sun a namaluɫaluɫay aravats, nuka ki sun a namazeli aravats, ui ḍi, ua ku tazua i Tayuang a ku sengsengan a ku qinadju a liaw aravats a tjakaɫavaɫava tjanuaken a namapalingzaɫ a namaparutsunuq anan, aya-u uta a kinemnem, sa su kipapupitsupitsul sa su kiqaung uta tua Tsemas.
S.PHON: ʎakua nuka ki sun a namaɭuʎaɭuʎaj aravaʦ, nuka ki sun a namazəɭi aravaʦ, ui ɖi, ua ku tazua i tajuaŋ a ku səŋsəŋan a ku qinaɉu a ɭiaw aravaʦ a cakaʎavaʎava canuakən a namapaɭiŋzaʎ a namaparuʦunuq anan, aja-u uta a kinəmnəm, sa su kipapupiʦupiʦuɭ sa su kiqauŋ uta tua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: ljakua nuka ki sun a namaluljaluljay aravac, nuka ki sun a namazeli aravac, ui dri, ua ku tazua i Tayuang a ku sengsengan a ku qinadju a liaw aravac a tjakaljavaljava tjanuaken a namapalingzalj a namaparucunuq anan, aya-u uta a kinemnem, sa su kipapupicupicul sa su kiqaung uta tua Cemas.
S.PHON: ʎakua nuka ki sun a namaɭuʎaɭuʎaj aravaʦ, nuka ki sun a namazəɭi aravaʦ, ui ɖi, ua ku tazua i tajuaŋ a ku səŋsəŋan a ku qinaɉu a ɭiaw aravaʦ a ʦakaʎavaʎava ʦanuakən a namapaɭiŋzaʎ a namaparuʦunuq anan, aja-u uta a kinəmnəm, sa su kipapupiʦupiʦuɭ sa su kiqauŋ uta tua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: but even if you are very weak, even if you are very tired, think like this: Yes, there is in Taiwan a lot of work that I left that is waiting for me that is incomplete(?) and still in a muddle; and so get more strength and pray to God.

S.FORM: pai tiamen uta aitsu a ḍusa tsaviɫ a uri su vinaikan, palamu ki mangtjez, aya men.
S.PHON: pai tiamən uta aiʦu a ɖusa ʦaviʎ a uri su vinaikan, paɭamu ki maŋcəz, aja mən.
S.FORM: pai tiamen uta aicu a drusa cavilj a uri su vinaikan, palamu ki mangtjez, aya men.
S.PHON: pai tiamən uta aiʦu a ɖusa ʦaviʎ a uri su vinaikan, paɭamu ki maŋʦəz, aja mən.
S.TRANSL: We too during these two years of your absence, we’ll say: He’ll soon come back.

S.FORM: inika nia linaḍuq a kinemnem.
S.PHON: inika nia ɭinaɖuq a kinəmnəm.
S.FORM: inika nia linadruq a kinemnem.
S.PHON: inika nia ɭinaɖuq a kinəmnəm.
S.TRANSL: We haven’t made it longer in our thinking.

S.FORM: kiqauqaung amen uta tua su sipupitsulan, tua su sikitsepelivan anan a sema Tayuang, tua su siqatsuvungan tua su sengsengan, tua mana uri nia sikeɫangan anga tua kai nua Tsemas uta a ɫemaluay.
S.PHON: kiqauqauŋ amən uta tua su sipupiʦuɭan, tua su sikiʦəpəɭivan anan a səma tajuaŋ, tua su siqaʦuvuŋan tua su səŋsəŋan, tua mana uri nia sikəʎaŋan aŋa tua kai nua ʦəmas uta a ʎəmaɭuaj.
S.FORM: kiqauqaung amen uta tua su sipupiculan, tua su sikicepelivan anan a sema Tayuang, tua su siqacuvungan tua su sengsengan, tua mana uri nia sikeljangan anga tua kai nua Cemas uta a ljemaluay.
S.PHON: kiqauqauŋ amən uta tua su sipupiʦuɭan, tua su sikiʦəpəɭivan anan a səma tajuaŋ, tua su siqaʦuvuŋan tua su səŋsəŋan, tua mana uri nia sikəʎaŋan aŋa tua kai nua ʦəmas uta a ʎəmaɭuaj.
S.TRANSL: And we pray too that you will be well, that you will return to Taiwan, that you will finish your work which will result in our understanding the word of God clearly.

S.FORM: qau saka aitsu uɫa sun a napupitsupitsul a palalaut, uɫa sun a kinizangan uta na Tsemas, ainu ki nu kisamuɫamuɫa sun a ventsik uɫa sun a papuquluquluin nua Tsemas ta su keɫangen a kirimu tua kai nua Tsemas.
S.PHON: qau saka aiʦu uʎa sun a napupiʦupiʦuɭ a paɭaɭaut, uʎa sun a kinizaŋan uta na ʦəmas, ainu ki nu kisamuʎamuʎa sun a vənʦik uʎa sun a papuquɭuquɭuin nua ʦəmas ta su kəʎaŋən a kirimu tua kai nua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: qau saka aicu ulja sun a napupicupicul a palalaut, ulja sun a kinizangan uta na Cemas, ainu ki nu kisamuljamulja sun a vencik ulja sun a papuquluquluin nua Cemas ta su keljangen a kirimu tua kai nua Cemas.
S.PHON: qau saka aiʦu uʎa sun a napupiʦupiʦuɭ a paɭaɭaut, uʎa sun a kinizaŋan uta na ʦəmas, ainu ki nu kisamuʎamuʎa sun a vənʦik uʎa sun a papuquɭuquɭuin nua ʦəmas ta su kəʎaŋən a kirimu tua kai nua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: And now may you be well always, may you be guarded by God. When you are studying hard may God make you clever so that you quickly understand the word of God.

S.FORM: pai nu tjaiviliɫ anga vetsivetsikan amen uta tua su tigami tuki sun a kemudakudanga tuki sun a paqenetj anan ta nia kai a kinatsalisianan.
S.PHON: pai nu caiviɭiʎ aŋa vəʦivəʦikan amən uta tua su tigami tuki sun a kəmudakudaŋa tuki sun a paqənəc anan ta nia kai a kinaʦaɭisianan.
S.FORM: pai nu tjaivililj anga vecivecikan amen uta tua su tigami tuki sun a kemudakudanga tuki sun a paqenetj anan ta nia kai a kinacalisianan.
S.PHON: pai nu ʦaiviɭiʎ aŋa vəʦivəʦikan amən uta tua su tigami tuki sun a kəmudakudaŋa tuki sun a paqənəʦ anan ta nia kai a kinaʦaɭisianan.
S.TRANSL: And in the future write us letters to tell us what you are doing and whether you still remember our mountain language.

S.FORM: qau aitsu nu tjaiviliɫ anga kitjen a metsevutsevung anan uta.
S.PHON: qau aiʦu nu caiviɭiʎ aŋa kicən a məʦəvuʦəvuŋ anan uta.
S.FORM: qau aicu nu tjaivililj anga kitjen a mecevucevung anan uta.
S.PHON: qau aiʦu nu ʦaiviɭiʎ aŋa kiʦən a məʦəvuʦəvuŋ anan uta.
S.TRANSL: And in the future we will all meet again.

S.FORM: tiamen namalevaleva men namapuzangal amen tua tja metsevutsevung nu tjaiviliɫ.
S.PHON: tiamən namaɭəvaɭəva mən namapuzaŋaɭ amən tua ca məʦəvuʦəvuŋ nu caiviɭiʎ.
S.FORM: tiamen namalevaleva men namapuzangal amen tua tja mecevucevung nu tjaivililj.
S.PHON: tiamən namaɭəvaɭəva mən namapuzaŋaɭ amən tua ʦa məʦəvuʦəvuŋ nu ʦaiviɭiʎ.
S.TRANSL: We are glad and hope for our meeting again in the future.

S.FORM: uɫa tjen a laḍuq anan a tja nasi, uɫa tjen a nasetsevung anan tjai sinsi, uɫa tjen a anan a kisamuɫa tua patjara Tsemas, nakidjadjalan ayaya men uta a kiqauqaung tua Tsemas.
S.PHON: uʎa cən a ɭaɖuq anan a ca nasi, uʎa cən a nasəʦəvuŋ anan cai sinsi, uʎa cən a anan a kisamuʎa tua pacara ʦəmas, nakiɉaɉaɭan ajaja mən uta a kiqauqauŋ tua ʦəmas.
S.FORM: ulja tjen a ladruq anan a tja nasi, ulja tjen a nasecevung anan tjai sinsi, ulja tjen a anan a kisamulja tua patjara Cemas, nakidjadjalan ayaya men uta a kiqauqaung tua Cemas.
S.PHON: uʎa ʦən a ɭaɖuq anan a ʦa nasi, uʎa ʦən a nasəʦəvuŋ anan ʦai sinsi, uʎa ʦən a anan a kisamuʎa tua paʦara ʦəmas, nakiɉaɉaɭan ajaja mən uta a kiqauqauŋ tua ʦəmas.
S.TRANSL: May our lives be long, so that we’ll meet the teacher again, so that we can join in working for God, is what we say in prayer to God.

S.FORM: saka kimen a napupitsupitsul uta, kimen a kiqaung tjanusun.
S.PHON: saka kimən a napupiʦupiʦuɭ uta, kimən a kiqauŋ canusun.
S.FORM: saka kimen a napupicupicul uta, kimen a kiqaung tjanusun.
S.PHON: saka kimən a napupiʦupiʦuɭ uta, kimən a kiqauŋ ʦanusun.
S.TRANSL: May we be well and we’ll pray for you.

S.FORM: tisun uta ki sun a napupitsupitsul uta sa su kiqauqaungan amen uta.
S.PHON: tisun uta ki sun a napupiʦupiʦuɭ uta sa su kiqauqauŋan amən uta.
S.FORM: tisun uta ki sun a napupicupicul uta sa su kiqauqaungan amen uta.
S.PHON: tisun uta ki sun a napupiʦupiʦuɭ uta sa su kiqauqauŋan amən uta.
S.TRANSL: And you too may you be well and pray for us too.

S.FORM: namatsatsadjatsadja itjen, ɫakua kitjen a namateveteveɫ i tjaiqayaw tua Tsemas, kitjen a tjara natjadjaladjalan sakamaya.
S.PHON: namaʦaʦaɉaʦaɉa icən, ʎakua kicən a namatəvətəvəʎ i caiqajaw tua ʦəmas, kicən a cara nacaɉaɭaɉaɭan sakamaja.
S.FORM: namacacadjacadja itjen, ljakua kitjen a namatevetevelj i tjaiqayaw tua Cemas, kitjen a tjara natjadjaladjalan sakamaya.
S.PHON: namaʦaʦaɉaʦaɉa iʦən, ʎakua kiʦən a namatəvətəvəʎ i ʦaiqajaw tua ʦəmas, kiʦən a ʦara naʦaɉaɭaɉaɭan sakamaja.
S.TRANSL: We are far apart, but we’ll be together before God and we’ll be united(?).

S.FORM: saka aitsu uri amin anga nua ku kai.
S.PHON: saka aiʦu uri amin aŋa nua ku kai.
S.FORM: saka aicu uri amin anga nua ku kai.
S.PHON: saka aiʦu uri amin aŋa nua ku kai.
S.TRANSL: And now this will be the end of my speech.

S.FORM: pakakiqauqaungi a palalaut a pasa tua Tsemas tua tja siselapay.
S.PHON: pakakiqauqauŋi a paɭaɭaut a pasa tua ʦəmas tua ca sisəɭapaj.
S.FORM: pakakiqauqaungi a palalaut a pasa tua Cemas tua tja siselapay.
S.PHON: pakakiqauqauŋi a paɭaɭaut a pasa tua ʦəmas tua ʦa sisəɭapaj.
S.TRANSL: Let us pray for one another always to God in our troubles.
